transcript.text:
Hello everyone [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
For today
I prepared Tiba Fried Chicken
4 of them here
Udon tteokboki (spicy rice cake)
10 cheeseballs
These are chocolate
Ones in the bottom are regular cheeseballs
Fried chicken gizzard here as well
Let me show you individually
This one's a regular fried chicken
This is GoMaGan Which is chili pepper, garlic, soy sauce
Garlic bread chicken
And we have spicy fried chicken
Looks good
Bon appetit

Too much foam
Half foam half drink
Refreshing
Let's try the regular one first
You can see it if I do this
[You can't go wrong with fried chicken]
Fried chicken is always delicious
The meat is so tender
[A good example of how to eat the drumstick]
Very crispy on the outside Chewy on the inside
There's a misconception about this restaurant using small chickens
Or like imported chicken
But this place...
I'm doing an ad
They use big chickens (No 9) and they are all domestic
I thought it won't be too much food

But it's more than I expected
Let's try a wing
This is the garlic bread chicken
There are bread crumbs
I've never had garlic bread flavored chicken before
[Recently released after 1 year of anticipation]
Interesting It really tastes like garlic bread
A sweet garlic bread
With some kind of seasoning on it I like it
It's a mix of those
It kind of feels like a dessert
Personally, it's really good
I brought gloves, but I haven't been using it
It's already all over my fingers
Spicy fried chicken
This one has a lot of meat

Glossy
This is exactly what I like
It's not too crispy
That's why I like it
You gotta have that little bit of sogginess
This one next I didn't try this yet
GMG Chicken
Soy sauce based, but it's red
This is Changnyeong garlic
It's been peeled within the past 10 days
No!
Why do you come here every time?
Every time I eat chicken
This one is boneless
I thought this would taste like the spicy seasoned chicken because of the color
but it definitely has that soy sauce taste

This is spicy
A very strong Cheongyang chili pepper flavor
And soy sauce chicken
Tteokboki (spicy rice cake)
It has udon inside
It's actually not udon It's rice cake shaped like udon
Very nice
There have been trends like Chicken+Pizza or Chicken+Rice
These days, it's Chicken+Tteokboki
Dip it
Chicken skin
Dip just the skin
[Fried chicken gizzard]
The first time I tried this, it opened my eyes
[Chewy and delicious]
Cheeseballs next

I've never had the chocolate one
I'm assuming it's going to be more like dessert I wonder how it'll taste
[Filled]
It's very chocolatey
This tastes good
I honestly thought that it would taste weird
This is a dessert
How did they manage to get melted chocolate in here?
Oh, because it's warm
Here we have sweet+salty flavors
Sweet, salty Sweet, salty
Some of them like the tteokboki is pretty spicy
It has a spicy kick
So the regular fried chicken, spicy fried chicken, and large coke for 23,500 Won (~$20 USD)
2 chickens for that price I think it's very cost-efficient
Now for the drumstick

They said that they came up with their garlic bread chicken derived from the famous Gangneung garlic bread
[Is that why it's this tasty?]
I can't be eating all the good ones first
I will eat the chicken breast now
I wish they had just the drumsticks and the wings
[Please make that a thing for Tzuyang]
How come I'm not using the gloves I brought?
It can get pretty tedious to eat traditionally with bones
But they taste different from boneless
I wish they came out with a deboning machine
1 more
This is that part
I know it but I don't know how to explain it
Snow chicken
Interesting
Everything is spicy

Is it because of the garlic?
It was spicy Wait, is this spicy?
[Seeing what's so spicy]
Yes, it is
[A good kind of spicy]
I didn't eat the regular cheeseball yet
Who is this?
[So good]
Next
Huge drumstick, right?
I think of this every time I eat drumsticks
I wish chickens had 6 legs each
6 legs and 6 wings
That'd look hideous
Can it be photoshopped?
[Just have some gizzard]

Don't swallow too much gizzard at once
My jaw
I think this tastes really good
I'm saving it for last
Check it out Amazing
Delicious
Jingu is not coming here today
I'll go bring him here
Meanie
For the wings, Grab the bones like this
Push it like this
Why is it not working
Push it down like this
The meat is consolidated
[Get it in 1 bite]
It feels like I'm slurping noodles, but it's rice cake

The sauce isn't too thick or sticky
[Taking a long time to eat the drumstick]
There are a lot of drumsticks that I can eat in 1 bite
But I can't do that with the ones from this restaurant
Look how big it is
There's a dipping sauce here
Garlic? The owner here must love garlic
How will it taste?
I like it because the flavor is not too strong
It's very subtle
Big
My mouth is going to explode
That's big
It's boneless too
Tender
This might not be spicy for everyone I'm just not good at eating this kind of spice

I'm heating up
This is a lot of fried chicken That's a first
1 piece left in each box
Last fried chicken
You tend to get sick of the same spicy seasoned chicken flavor
But that's not the case here
[No mercy]
[3rd bottle of Coke]
Don't you guys drink about 3 bottles too?
Refreshing
[Almost finished?]
[Chicken gizzard too]
Their food is not too greasy
I think that's why I'm enjoying it to the end
Last piece
Leg meat

[Last cheeseball]
I saved this one for last
Today's MVP
[Finished]
[Chocolate cheeseball is highly recommended]
I just had Tiba Fried Chicken today
The flavor was good and the food portion was nice
Also very cost-efficient
Thanks everyone
[Part of the advertising revenue will be donated to 'Dream Blue School Regional Children's Center'] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
